recent.statement: A significant increase in global oil prices will occur within the next week due to a potential disruption at the Bab el-Mandeb Strait.
recent.evidence: Brent Crude fell 9.24% to $91.39/bbl, showing a price decrease rather than the forecast significant increase.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike Japan within the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports a major earthquake in the Volcano Islands region during the window, which an event of that magnitude would certainly have generated.

recent.statement: The price of oil will rise due to disruptions at the Bab el-Mandeb chokepoint
recent.evidence: Brent Crude fell 9.24% to $91.39, showing oil prices dropped rather than rose despite the Bab el-Mandeb chokepoint alert.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Mexico, causing widespread damage
recent.evidence: All cyclone signals are green alerts with zero population affected at Category 1+ winds, showing no landfall causing widespread damage in Mexico.

recent.statement: Texas electricity demand will exceed 64 GWh/h for 3 consecutive days
recent.evidence: None of the signals reference Texas electricity demand or any GWh/h figures, and no signal shows the demand threshold being met over three consecutive days.

recent.statement: The Iranian conflict will escalate with increased military strikes in the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, so there is no evidence that escalated military strikes occurred within the window.

recent.statement: Hurricane Fausto intensifies to Category 2, disrupting shipping in the eastern Pacific Ocean
recent.evidence: Signal S11 shows FAUSTO-26 as only a Tropical Storm with 0 population affected by Category 1 or higher winds, far below the forecast Category 2 intensification.

recent.statement: The US will launch another round of airstrikes against Iran within the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows US airstrikes against Iran occurred within the window, and such a major event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A major oil tanker will pass through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait within the next week
recent.evidence: The only Bab el-Mandeb signal shows a critical chokepoint status with LIVE SHIPS: 0, confirming no tanker transit was captured rather than a major oil tanker passing through.

recent.statement: Donald Trump will announce that Jon Ossof and Raphael Warnock are illegitimate Senators by the end of the week
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows Trump making such an announcement, and an event this notable would have been captured within the window.

recent.statement: A significant earthquake will occur in the South Sandwich Islands within the next week
recent.evidence: The only signal shows an M4.9 quake, which does not meet the threshold for a 'significant' earthquake in the South Sandwich Islands.

recent.statement: S&P 500 futures will dip below 7450 due to geopolitical risk premium
recent.evidence: No signal reports the S&P 500 futures level; only Nasdaq 100 futures (S13) is shown, so no evidence confirms a dip below 7450.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
